children.heading: Promulgation of regulations and guidelines; report
children.label: a Promulgation of regulations and guidelines; report

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations and guidelines to implement this subchapter as expeditiously as practicable.

children.heading: Consultation with Attorney General
children.label: B Consultation with Attorney General
children.text: The Secretary shall consult with the Attorney General on the promulgation of regulations and guidelines under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Report
children.label: 2 Report
children.text: The Secretary shall annually submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report containing updates on the implementation of this subchapter.

children.heading: Authority
children.label: b Authority
children.text: Subject to subsection (c)(3)(B), the Secretary shall have sole authority to promulgate Federal regulations and guidelines that relate to the production of hemp, including Federal regulations and guidelines that relate to the implementation of sections 1639p and 1639q of this title.
the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act ( et seq.);21 U.S.C. 301

children.label: i
children.text: the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act ( et seq.); or21 U.S.C. 301

children.label: B
children.text: to promulgate Federal regulations and guidelines that relate to the production of hemp under the Act described in subparagraph (A)(i) or the section described in subparagraph (A)(ii).
